'''Kaump III''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Bruanii sector/Legends|Bruanii sector]]. Its high [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] led to its [[Chanchaz Iryt's species|native species]] being short-statured and with a dense body structure. The [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Chanchaz Iryt]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on Kaump III and eventually left his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] after committing a series of lucrative [[Thief/Legends|robberies]] in an affluent district of a local [[City/Legends|city]].

==Description==
Kaump III, also known simply as Kaump, was a high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the third [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="Polyhedron68" /> in the [[Kaump system/Legends|Kaump system]], a part of the [[Bruanii sector/Legends|Bruanii sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of<ref name="WesternReaches" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
The future [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Chanchaz Iryt]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on Kaump III. A member of the planet's native [[Chanchaz Iryt's species|species]], during his early life Iryt studied all he could about [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] mechanics. At [[Local day/Legends|nights]], he instead learned about brawling and bullying at some of his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld's]] rough [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclubs]]. Eventually he was working on [[Engine/Legends|engines]] as well as [[Thief/Legends|robbing]] [[Alcohol/Legends|intoxicated]] people and lost tourists for drink [[Currency/Legends|money]]. Iryt soon decided, however, that he was destined for more in life. He then committed a series of highly lucrative and highly publicized robberies in an affluent neighborhood of a local [[City/Legends|city]] and subsequently, at some point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], left Kaump III aboard a [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] traveling to<ref name="Polyhedron68" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] planet [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Inhabitants==
Kaump III was home to a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]]. Due to the planet's high gravity, members of the species had a short stature and a dense body structure.<ref name="Polyhedron68" />

==Locations==
Kaump III had at least one city and featured several nightclubs.<ref name="Polyhedron68" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kaump III was mentioned in "[[Iron Hands, Captive Hearts]]," a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] source article written by [[Joe Littrell]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and published in the [[Polyhedron 68|sixty-eighth issue]] of the ''[[Polyhedron]]'' magazine in [[February]] [[1992]]. Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="Polyhedron68" /> it was considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="UnlicensedStatus">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Kaump [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Kaump III, in grid square K-17.<ref name="TEA Kaump" />
